content_body: We have stayed at many cabins in a wide range of locations. Everyone agreed that this was our favorite place! The cabin was beautifully decorated. There were other homes/cabins nearby, but we never heard anyone at all. The layout was perfect so that we could spend time together, but also have space to spread out. The outdoor fireplace and seating was great. Don't even get me started on the master bathroom with the garden tub and the separate rain shower! I could go on and on! It was absolutely the cleanest place we have ever stayed. We didn't see a trace of dust or dirty windows and not a single bug. The time we stayed there wasn't nearly long enough. We will be booking again as soon as we can!
title: Our Favorite Place!
